title: Feature Root: TUI observability rendering clarity
description: Shared execution root for spec-787eb92e. This container is non-runnable and groups the focused implementation, validation, documentation, and review beads required to deliver the TUI observability updates after spec-f4a943a4 is available.
acceptance_criteria: All concrete implementation work for this spec is represented in child beads rather than on the root bead.
The plan preserves the upstream dependency on spec-f4a943a4 by assuming `bead_deferred` reporter support already exists before execution starts.
The combined child beads cover elapsed timers, stale lease visibility, deferred bead clarity, status bar updates, validation, documentation, and review.
